positions.title: Full-stack Software Engineer
positions.technologies: Vue.js, PHP, PostgreSQL, GitHub Actions, RESTful APIs
bullets: Built cross-departmental task tracking application using Vue.js and PHP (OOP), optimized PostgreSQL schema to enhance foundry process visibility, reduced query time by 20%, enabled real-time updates through RESTful APIs.
Implemented CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions, reduced deployment time by 40%, increased automated test coverage to 95%, ensuring faster and more reliable production releases.
Complied with Intel security protocols to eliminate critical code vulnerabilities, prevented potential service downtime, improved API throughput during overload scenarios.

positions.title: Full-stack Software Engineer Graduate Intern
bullets: Migrated legacy internal tools to Next.js, modernized UI/UX and backend logic, improved load speed, achieved 500+ active user adoption within 3 months.
Led Dockerization of team's major projects, reduced onboarding setup time from one day to under 2 hours, enabling consistent deployment across development, staging, and production.

positions.title: Software Engineer II
positions.technologies: React, Redux, Adobe Target, NPM, Webpack, JavaScript
bullets: Contributed to integrating acquired company (Avast) payment pages into existing eStore platform using React + Redux, optimized performance and user experience, improved payment conversion rate by 6%.
Implemented JavaScript DOM manipulation scripts in Adobe Target to resolve high-priority production issues during eStore checkout, minimized cart abandonment rates.
Introduced NPM and Webpack to modernize legacy codebase, modularization and bundling, reduced load times and deployment complexity.
Led A/B testing initiatives for payment pages, doubled experiment count and accelerated iteration speed using Adobe Target, made significant contribution to conversion rate increases.

positions.title: Associate Software Engineer
positions.technologies: React, Redux, Immutable.js, CSS, Flexbox, Adobe Analytics, JIRA
bullets: Created various responsive components to enhance Global eStore payment pages using technologies like React, Redux, Immutable.js, CSS, Flexbox.
Refactored Adobe Analytics reporting code into reusable functions, reduced report maintenance time by 50%.
Learned agile methodologies, collaborated cross-functionally with PMs and QA engineers, used JIRA for task management, built strong foundation for cross-team collaboration and iterative development.

positions.title: Software Engineer
positions.technologies: Angular.js, JavaScript, jQuery, Ajax, Node.js, Bootstrap, MySQL
bullets: Developed voice recognition-based exam module using Angular.js that converts user voice to text and compares with database answers, for practical educational web applications.

Built practical Korean SAT preparation web application with Role-Based Access Control (RBAC), providing secure and personalized access for students and instructors; used JavaScript, jQuery, Ajax, Node.js, Bootstrap, MySQL to improve content delivery speed and user experience.
